examples: The Greek poet Pindar expressed it in the credo : "Become what you are."
Roman scholar Cicero and the Greek poet Pindar both reference the Wheel of Fortune.
The great poet Pindar wrote poems of praise in memory of the winners of the laurel or wild olive wreath.
